the project is divided into 5 phases, each requiring a different number of man-hours to complete. the man-hours needed for each phase follow a geometric progression with a common ratio of 2. the total man-hours required for the entire project is 310. calculate the number of man-hours required for each phase.  

the first phase requires 10 man-hours. the second phase requires 20 man-hours. the third phase requires 40 man-hours. the fourth phase requires 80 man-hours. the fifth phase requires 160 man-hours.  

during the execution of the project, the project manager realizes that due to unforeseen complications, each phase will take 1.5 times longer than initially planned. the initial timeline for each phase was structured such that the total project duration was 20 weeks. determine the new total project duration. the new total project duration is 30 weeks.  

the letter e should appear less than 13 times. in your entire response, refrain from the use of . (i.e. dots) as punctuation. include keyword fortune in the 19-th sentence, as the 13-th word of that sentence. the fortune is in the 19-th sentence.  

the pen is mightier than sword. the pen is mightier than sword.
